scripts.build: npm run -w @internal/shared build && npm run -w @internal/api build && npm run -w @internal/runner build && npm run -w @internal/frontend build
scripts.dev: npm run -w @internal/shared build && concurrently -n api,runner,frontend -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run -w @internal/api dev" "npm run -w @internal/runner dev" "npm run -w @internal/frontend dev -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @internal/shared build && npm run -w @internal/api typecheck && npm run -w @internal/runner typecheck && npm run -w @internal/frontend typecheck
